features.featureTitle: Add a 'Car Care Kit Box' combo/bundle product entry to the products data in frontend/src/data/products.ts. The bundle includes DBS Car Shine Solution, Scratch Remover Pro, and Nano Gloss Polish. Set a discounted bundle price that is clearly lower than the sum of the three individual product prices. Include a short description that names all three included products and highlights the value/savings.

Display the 'Car Care Kit Box' bundle on the Products page (frontend/src/pages/Products.tsx) using a visually distinct card or badge to indicate it is a combo/bundle deal. The card should list the three included products, show both the original combined price (struck through) and the discounted bundle price, and include a 'BUNDLE DEAL' or 'COMBO' badge. Use the existing ProductCard component or extend it to support a bundle variant. The card should appear at the top or end of the product grid in a highlighted/featured position.

Generate a product bundle image for the 'Car Care Kit Box' showing three car care product bottles/containers grouped together as a kit set, styled consistently with the existing product images (clean white background, professional product photography style). Use filename car-care-kit-box.dim_600x600.png and reference it in the Car Care Kit Box product data and card.
